title: {{serverName}} - Minecraft Server
tag: Welcome to {{serverName}} — a friendly and fun Minecraft server (Survival / Creative).
feature_modes: Game modes: Survival / Creative / Skyblock (customize as needed)
about_text: {{serverName}} aims to provide a stable, low-latency and community-friendly experience. Whether you want to explore, build or join events, there is something for you.
rule_1: Respect others; no harassment or discrimination.
rule_2: No exploiting bugs or using hacked clients.
rule_3: Do not destroy others' builds without permission (except public areas).
rule_4: Follow admin instructions; violations may result in warnings/bans.
howto_step1: Open Multiplayer in the Minecraft client.
howto_step3: Join our Discord if whitelist or specific version is required.
map_text: If you use Dynmap or similar services, you can embed it here:
join_text: Join our Discord for announcements, events and whitelist requests.
donate_text: Support server costs; donations go to hosting, plugins and events (optional).
server_ip_placeholder: Server address is provided after Discord or group verification.
